name: Power Vice Dragon
name_jp: パワー・バイス・ドラゴン
desc: A "Red Dragon Archfiend" that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Power Vice Dragon" once per turn. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are DARK Synchro Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Resonator" monster from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except DARK Synchro Monsters.
mnst_eff: A "Red Dragon Archfiend" that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Power Vice Dragon" once per turn. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are DARK Synchro Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Resonator" monster from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except DARK Synchro Monsters.
eff: A "Red Dragon Archfiend" that was Synchro Summoned using this card as material cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Power Vice Dragon" once per turn. If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are DARK Synchro Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Resonator" monster from your Deck to your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except DARK Synchro Monsters.

action: Applies effect when used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
